relationships.weight: Bt maize was developed using genes from Bacillus thuringiensis
Bt maize events were tested in Kenya
Bt maize expresses the cry1Ab gene
Bt maize expresses the cry1Ba gene
Leaf damage was evaluated at CFTs
Exit holes were evaluated at CFTs
Tunnel length was evaluated at CFTs
Mortality rates were evaluated at NARL
Bt maize does not effectively control Busseola fusca
Chilo partellus damage was compared to CML216
Stem borers affect leaf area consumed
